sentences.target: Je change le cadre de la photo.
sentences.reading: /ʒə ʃɑ̃ʒ lə kadʁ də la foto/

translations.fr: Je change le cadre de la photo.
translations.ipa: /ʒə ʃɑ̃ʒ lə kadʁ də la foto/
translations.es: Estoy cambiando el marco de la foto.
translations.it: Sto cambiando la cornice della foto.
translations.pt: Estou trocando a moldura da foto.
translations.he: אני מחליף את המסגרת של התמונה.
translations.hi: मैं फोटो का फ्रेम बदल रहा हूँ.
translations.ja: 写真の額縁を交換しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular; subject of the verb 'change'.
Main verb in present indicative, 1st person singular; denotes the action of altering/switching.
Definite article, masculine singular; introduces the noun 'cadre' and marks specificity.
Common noun, masculine singular; here means the physical frame; direct object of 'change'.
Preposition introducing a complement ('de la photo') specifying what the frame belongs to.
Definite article, feminine singular; introduces the noun 'photo'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'de'.

sentences.target: Le cadre est trop grand pour l'affiche.
sentences.reading: /lə kadʁ ɛ tʁo ɡʁɑ̃ puʁ lafiʃ/

translations.fr: Le cadre est trop grand pour l'affiche.
translations.ipa: /lə kadʁ ɛ tʁo ɡʁɑ̃ puʁ lafiʃ/
translations.en: The frame is too big for the poster.
translations.es: El marco es demasiado grande para el póster.
translations.de: Der Rahmen ist zu groß für das Poster.
translations.it: La cornice è troppo grande per il poster.
translations.zh-Hans: 这个相框对海报来说太大了。
translations.yue: 呢個相架對張海報嚟講太大啦。
translations.pt: A moldura é grande demais para o pôster.
translations.vi: Khung quá lớn so với tấm poster.
translations.ar: الإطار كبير جدًا بالنسبة إلى الملصق.
translations.nl: De lijst is te groot voor de poster.
translations.hu: A keret túl nagy a poszterhez.
translations.hi: पोस्टर के लिए फ्रेम बहुत बड़ा है.
translations.pl: Rama jest za duża na plakat.
translations.el: Η κορνίζα είναι πολύ μεγάλη για την αφίσα.
translations.nb: Rammen er for stor til plakaten.
translations.sv: Ramen är för stor för affischen.
translations.ro: Rama este prea mare pentru afiș.
translations.cs: Rám je příliš velký na plakát.
translations.da: Rammen er for stor til plakaten.
translations.ja: その額縁はポスターには大きすぎます。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine singular; introduces the subject noun 'cadre'.
Common noun, masculine singular; subject of 'est'; refers to a physical frame.
Copular verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; links subject to the predicate adjective.
Adverb of degree; intensifies 'grand' to express excess.
Predicate adjective, masculine singular; complements 'est' and describes the subject.
Preposition introducing a purpose/compatibility complement ('pour l'affiche').
Common noun, feminine singular; object of 'pour'. Surface includes elided definite article 'l'' (la → l' before vowel).

sentences.target: Mon amie est cadre dans une banque.
sentences.reading: /mɔ̃n ami ɛ kadʁ dɑ̃z yn bɑ̃k/

translations.fr: Mon amie est cadre dans une banque.
translations.ipa: /mɔ̃n ami ɛ kadʁ dɑ̃z yn bɑ̃k/
translations.en: My friend is a manager at a bank.
translations.es: Mi amiga es gerente en un banco.
translations.de: Meine Freundin ist Managerin bei einer Bank.
translations.it: La mia amica è dirigente in una banca.
translations.zh-Hans: 我的朋友在银行当经理。
translations.yue: 我個朋友喺銀行做經理。
translations.pt: Minha amiga é gerente em um banco.
translations.vi: Bạn tôi là quản lý tại một ngân hàng.
translations.nl: Mijn vriendin is manager bij een bank.
translations.hi: मेरी सहेली बैंक में प्रबंधक है.
translations.pl: Moja przyjaciółka jest menedżerką w banku.
translations.el: Η φίλη μου είναι διευθύντρια σε τράπεζα.
translations.nb: Venninnen min er leder i en bank.
translations.id: Teman saya adalah manajer di sebuah bank.
translations.sv: Min vän är chef på en bank.
translations.ro: Prietena mea este manager la o bancă.
translations.cs: Moje kamarádka je manažerka v bance.
translations.da: Min veninde er leder i en bank.
translations.ja: 私たちはプロジェクトの枠組みについて話し合っています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, masculine singular form used before vowel-initial nouns; introduces 'amie' (feminine).
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the subject noun phrase ('Mon amie').
Copular verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; links subject to the predicate nominal.
Common noun, masculine invariable for job titles; predicate nominal meaning 'manager/executive'.
Preposition introducing a locative complement ('dans une banque').
Indefinite article, feminine singular; introduces the noun 'banque'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'dans'.

sentences.target: On discute du cadre du projet.

translations.fr: On discute du cadre du projet.
translations.es: Estamos discutiendo el alcance del proyecto.
translations.ko: 우리는 프로젝트의 범위에 대해 논의하고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们正在讨论项目的框架。
translations.yue: 我哋喺討論項目嘅框架。
translations.pt: Estamos discutindo o escopo do projeto.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang thảo luận về khung dự án.
translations.nl: We bespreken het kader van het проект.
translations.hi: हम परियोजना के ढाँचे पर चर्चा कर रहे हैं.
translations.ja: 私たちはプロジェクトの枠組みについて話し合っています。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/impersonal subject pronoun; here means 'we/one'; subject of 'discute'.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular (with 'on'); denotes the act of discussing.
Preposition 'de' contracted with the definite article 'le' (de + le); introduces the complement 'cadre'.
Common noun, masculine singular; here means the framework/context; object of 'du'.
Preposition 'de' contracted with 'le' (de + le); introduces the complement 'projet'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the second 'du'; specifies which framework.
